title: Reason & Rheotric
subtitle: Exploring the impact of Artificial Intelligence through critical thinking and debate. Encouraging diverse perspectives and meaningful discourse on emerging technologies.
description:
Title of the event: The Reason & Rhetoric Debate Competition 
 Objective of the event : The primary objective of The Reason & Rhetoric Debate Competition, held in April 2023, and organized by BVP Optica, was to serve as a platform for exploring the multifaceted discourse surrounding the impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on humanity. The competition aimed to foster diverse perspectives, thought-provoking arguments, and critical analysis on both the positive and negative implications of AI.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Debate competition focused on the impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI).
Promoted awareness of emerging technological challenges.
